seoTitle: Shanes Park vs Shannon Brook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Shanes Park and Shannon Brook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Shanes Park vs Shannon Brook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shanes Park and Shannon Brook.
heading: Shanes Park vs Shannon Brook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shanes Park, New South Wales and Shannon Brook, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shannon Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Shanes Park (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shanes Park or Shannon Brook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shanes Park has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Shannon Brook scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shanes Park scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Shannon Brook scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shanes Park or Shannon Brook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shannon Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
